title: Crowded Room, Empty Heart
lyricSeed:
Across the crowded room I catch your eye
A hundred people dancing, still I feel so shy
You turn away, oh, and the record spins
Another lonely night where nobody wins
Sha-la-la, I'm longing here alone
Wishing you would call my telephone
